sections.paragraph:
- Original: πώς

- Transliteration: #NAME?

- Phonetic: poce

- Definition:

1. by any means, at all, perhaps

- Origin: adverb from the base of G4225, an enclitic particle of indefiniteness of manner

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Adverb from the base of G4225; an enclitic particle of indefiniteness of manner; somehow or anyhow; used only in compounds: - haply by any (some) means perhaps. See G1513 G3381. Compare G4459.
